player_notes.james harden: Scored a playoff-best 30 points in Game 5 OT win; elevated role and usage confirmed heading into Game 6 vs. Detroit.
player_notes.duncan robinson: Missed Game 5 with lower back soreness; status unclear for Game 6, monitor injury report.
player_notes.og anunoby: Growing optimism he returns for start of ECF; availability for potential Knicks series opener is improving.
player_notes.donovan mitchell: Posted 21 points in Game 5 OT win; standard role, no injury concerns noted heading into Game 6.

game_notes.DET vs CLE: Duncan Robinson (back soreness) missed Game 5 and status is uncertain for Game 6, affecting Detroit's perimeter rotation and 3PT volume.
game_notes.SAS vs MIN: Timberwolves face elimination in Game 6; Anthony Edwards expected to shoulder heavy usage load in a must-win spot.
